phishing.description: Fake login pages, credential theft, and brand impersonation

malware.description: Malware distribution, payload hosting, exploit delivery, and command-and-control infrastructure

shortener-loop.description: Public URL shorteners used to hide redirect chains or obscure the final destination

platform-share.description: Official sharing domains operated by major platforms where the short domain is part of the product experience rather than an open generic shortener

scanner-probe.description: Automated vulnerability scanner paths that should not resolve as short links

temporary-file-host.description: Temporary, anonymous, or disposable file hosting with elevated abuse risk

disposable.description: Burner services, temporary email, throwaway infrastructure, and low-accountability services

adult.description: Owner-selected adult or NSFW content policy category

social.description: Owner-selected social media or user-generated-content policy category

custom.description: Owner-defined local block that does not fit another category

critical.description: Known active abuse that can quickly get the short domain blacklisted

high.description: Malware, phishing, credential theft, or active malicious infrastructure

medium.description: Obfuscation, redirect chaining, anonymous hosting, or elevated abuse risk

low.description: Policy or nuisance block with lower direct security risk

info.description: Documentation, classification, or owner-defined informational category
